testcase.name: Crear transacción exitosa
testcase.classname: Validación de transacciones PSE en Wompi

testcase.name: Monto inválido
testcase.classname: Validación de transacciones PSE en Wompi
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Monto inválido &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/transaction.feature:8&amp#27;[0m STRING A FIRMAR: ref-17778682513630COPtest_integrity_kMuygkr7xAA3q07a1dPwsBgJYEhpiwVQ SIGNATURE: 7a8f9726cf7b89be852a1ff1bfec1c81c956ca4c0dcd75556cffe40f3a8736b1 BODY FINAL: {reference=ref-1777868251363, amount_in_cents=0, signature=7a8f9726cf7b89be852a1ff1bfec1c81c956ca4c0dcd75556cffe40f3a8736b1, acceptance_token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJjb250cmFjdF9pZCI6NDcyLCJwZXJtYWxpbmsiOiJodHRwczovL3dvbXBpLmNvbS9hc3NldHMvZG93bmxvYWRibGUvcmVnbGFtZW50by1Vc3Vhcmlvcy1Db2xvbWJpYS5wZGYiLCJmaWxlX2hhc2giOiJkYzJkNGUzMDVlNGQzNmFhYjhjYzU3N2I1YTY5Nzg1MSIsImppdCI6IjE3Nzc4NjgyNTEtMjM1NjUiLCJlbWFpbCI6IiIsImV4cCI6MTc3Nzg3MTg1MX0.CzJkDzhEurguP-t3J1xcMbobrgrADWvVdKkYUC_Bflc, customer_email=test@test.com, currency=COP, payment_method={user_legal_id=123456789, user_type=0, financial_institution_code=1022, user_legal_id_type=CC, payment_description=Pago de prueba, type=PSE}} &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mtengo un request con monto en cero&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.montoCero()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32menvío la solicitud de creación de transacción&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.envioSolicitud()&amp#27;[0m HTTP/1.1 422 Unprocessable Entity Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 153 Connection: keep-alive Date: Mon, 04 May 2026 04:17:32 GMT apigw-requestid: c0machwnIAMEY7Q= vary: Origin X-Cache: Error from cloudfront Via: 1.1 5f040b97224682b7d52e78e15b9d27ce.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: MIA3-P3 X-Amz-Cf-Id: yJj0lb5RTJk21hiZk8q_psGCCj2yOI3BSKMNdU271ktLC_kNjIKaAw== X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000
{ "error": { "type": "INPUT_VALIDATION_ERROR", "messages": { "valid_amount_in_cents": [ "El monto mínimo de una transacción es $1,500 exceptuando impuestos" ] } } } &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mel status code debe ser &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m422&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.validarStatusCode(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Email inválido
testcase.classname: Validación de transacciones PSE en Wompi
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Email inválido &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/transaction.feature:13&amp#27;[0m STRING A FIRMAR: ref-1777868252492150000COPtest_integrity_kMuygkr7xAA3q07a1dPwsBgJYEhpiwVQ SIGNATURE: d374666575ef1aca383ae13f95164e32356fdfc613c2c57814df204de92313d0 BODY FINAL: {reference=ref-1777868252492, amount_in_cents=150000, signature=d374666575ef1aca383ae13f95164e32356fdfc613c2c57814df204de92313d0, acceptance_token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJjb250cmFjdF9pZCI6NDcyLCJwZXJtYWxpbmsiOiJodHRwczovL3dvbXBpLmNvbS9hc3NldHMvZG93bmxvYWRibGUvcmVnbGFtZW50by1Vc3Vhcmlvcy1Db2xvbWJpYS5wZGYiLCJmaWxlX2hhc2giOiJkYzJkNGUzMDVlNGQzNmFhYjhjYzU3N2I1YTY5Nzg1MSIsImppdCI6IjE3Nzc4NjgyNTItNDY4NjEiLCJlbWFpbCI6IiIsImV4cCI6MTc3Nzg3MTg1Mn0.f92O8CEj2Uo15HtsRob83YnX7ABhX6SN_oYHDPiJQ34, customer_email=correo_invalido, currency=COP, payment_method={user_legal_id=123456789, user_type=0, financial_institution_code=1022, user_legal_id_type=CC, payment_description=Pago de prueba, type=PSE}} &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mtengo un request con email inválido&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.emailInvalido()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32menvío la solicitud de creación de transacción&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.envioSolicitud()&amp#27;[0m HTTP/1.1 422 Unprocessable Entity Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 93 Connection: keep-alive Date: Mon, 04 May 2026 04:17:33 GMT apigw-requestid: c0manjnRIAMEMxQ= vary: Origin X-Cache: Error from cloudfront Via: 1.1 537b8231c656191e8b2efa173787e180.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: MIA3-P3 X-Amz-Cf-Id: 12_1rNRwcW3JzEh7PTDs9SwXNgapG6k1M0MUiM4NT2tbTE6Fr0r-sA== X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000
{ "error": { "type": "INPUT_VALIDATION_ERROR", "messages": { "customer_email": [ "Email inválido" ] } } } &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mel status code debe ser &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m422&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.validarStatusCode(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Llave inválida
testcase.classname: Validación de transacciones PSE en Wompi
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Llave inválida &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/transaction.feature:18&amp#27;[0m STRING A FIRMAR: ref-1777868253432150000COPtest_integrity_kMuygkr7xAA3q07a1dPwsBgJYEhpiwVQ SIGNATURE: 47077d5d9cfb4e77b16a9d183ad9b335a4dac1eac30f54ce51da69469b85ddd4 BODY FINAL: {reference=ref-1777868253432, amount_in_cents=150000, signature=47077d5d9cfb4e77b16a9d183ad9b335a4dac1eac30f54ce51da69469b85ddd4, acceptance_token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJjb250cmFjdF9pZCI6NDcyLCJwZXJtYWxpbmsiOiJodHRwczovL3dvbXBpLmNvbS9hc3NldHMvZG93bmxvYWRibGUvcmVnbGFtZW50by1Vc3Vhcmlvcy1Db2xvbWJpYS5wZGYiLCJmaWxlX2hhc2giOiJkYzJkNGUzMDVlNGQzNmFhYjhjYzU3N2I1YTY5Nzg1MSIsImppdCI6IjE3Nzc4NjgyNTMtNTg2ODgiLCJlbWFpbCI6IiIsImV4cCI6MTc3Nzg3MTg1M30.HSfXk2F-01kyS8BExNIqMxyLyWpsQXQO_HR-wxQzGRM, customer_email=test@test.com, currency=COP, payment_method={user_legal_id=123456789, user_type=0, financial_institution_code=1022, user_legal_id_type=CC, payment_description=Pago de prueba, type=PSE}} &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muso una llave privada inválida&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.llaveInvalida()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32menvío la solicitud de creación de transacción&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.envioSolicitud()&amp#27;[0m HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 128 Connection: keep-alive Date: Mon, 04 May 2026 04:17:34 GMT apigw-requestid: c0maxhShoAMEM-Q= vary: Origin X-Cache: Error from cloudfront Via: 1.1 d6c3d8e2bcf9b0f41a443121af4c96bc.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: MIA3-P3 X-Amz-Cf-Id: VushXRUNG6mk8Y32iet5QvjnwgtkPIGHzNCmiWmWFYutfoFt6h4elg== X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000
{ "error": { "type": "INVALID_ACCESS_TOKEN", "reason": "La llave proporcionada no corresponde a este ambiente, se recibió: INVALID" } } &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mel status code debe ser &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m401&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.validarStatusCode(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Validación de límites de monto #1
testcase.classname: Validación de transacciones PSE en Wompi
testcase.system-out:
Scenario Outline: Validación de límites de monto &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/transaction.feature:31&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mtengo un request base de PSE&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.requestBasePSE()&amp#27;[0m STRING A FIRMAR: ref-1777868254134149900COPtest_integrity_kMuygkr7xAA3q07a1dPwsBgJYEhpiwVQ SIGNATURE: 6c9ec1d33906521912cd938102c77e594a79b0f06202438ba0e53b1f7e053996 BODY FINAL: {reference=ref-1777868254134, amount_in_cents=149900, signature=6c9ec1d33906521912cd938102c77e594a79b0f06202438ba0e53b1f7e053996, acceptance_token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJjb250cmFjdF9pZCI6NDcyLCJwZXJtYWxpbmsiOiJodHRwczovL3dvbXBpLmNvbS9hc3NldHMvZG93bmxvYWRibGUvcmVnbGFtZW50by1Vc3Vhcmlvcy1Db2xvbWJpYS5wZGYiLCJmaWxlX2hhc2giOiJkYzJkNGUzMDVlNGQzNmFhYjhjYzU3N2I1YTY5Nzg1MSIsImppdCI6IjE3Nzc4NjgyNTQtOTgyMjEiLCJlbWFpbCI6IiIsImV4cCI6MTc3Nzg3MTg1NH0.DhYcHNs70Zx_F_Aj8KvqiMvZLnPV7OMO4anufKbufoA, customer_email=test@test.com, currency=COP, payment_method={user_legal_id=123456789, user_type=0, financial_institution_code=1022, user_legal_id_type=CC, payment_description=Pago de prueba, type=PSE}} &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32masigno el monto &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m149900&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.asignoMonto(java.lang.Integer)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32menvío la solicitud de creación de transacción&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.envioSolicitud()&amp#27;[0m HTTP/1.1 422 Unprocessable Entity Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 153 Connection: keep-alive Date: Mon, 04 May 2026 04:17:35 GMT apigw-requestid: c0ma4gBlIAMEYYQ= vary: Origin X-Cache: Error from cloudfront Via: 1.1 4c3c3d48e1596e1c2c468662d48c7cc8.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: MIA3-P3 X-Amz-Cf-Id: u0htIkdXtOyIUpqrxzYMmprsDVhrCcloaXOtdmUZo2hTfv7xdLZUcA== X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000
{ "error": { "type": "INPUT_VALIDATION_ERROR", "messages": { "valid_amount_in_cents": [ "El monto mínimo de una transacción es $1,500 exceptuando impuestos" ] } } } &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mel status code debe ser &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m422&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TransactionSteps.validarStatusCode(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Validación de límites de monto #2
